description: Full 2^k factorial DOE matrix: all main effects and all interactions estimable, returned in real units with a randomized run order.
rules: read-only — reads a JSON spec, writes a CSV; mutates no live service
seeded — the run order is reproducible from SPEC_JSON.seed
each factor needs a (low, high) pair
usage: Set SPEC_JSON to a JSON file with keys: factors (required dict {name:[low,high]}), randomize (bool, default true), seed (int). Output: experimental_runs.csv under record_store.
limitation: Use for k up to ~5; beyond that 2^k runs get expensive (switch to fractional-factorial or plackett-burman). Two-level designs cannot detect curvature. When pyDOE3 is absent the porter writes an empty {} artifact.
